breakdown: This PR fixes XP extraction priority by ensuring xp_awarded from combat/encounter summaries takes precedence over rewards_pending xp. It removes the _extract_xp_from_player_data helper in favor of existing extract_character_xp. Positive: clear variable naming (xp_awarded_raw, xp_from_combat), runtime type checks for dict inputs, centralized XP logic. Negative: tests for deleted function become invalid, no tests for synthesized rewards box changes, new code lacks docstrings, no explicit exception handling.
key_changes: Extract xp_awarded from combat_summary before falling back to rewards_pending in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box (combat path)
Extract xp_awarded from encounter_summary before falling back to rewards_pending in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box (encounter path)
Replace _extract_xp_from_player_data calls with extract_character_xp throughout codebase
Change wrapper from check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl to ensure_level_up_rewards_pending
